subject: Fix submodule access information
commit_message:
Fix submodule access information

Use GitHub to replicate submodule

Change-Id: Iec979f8b8f8ba35b751bac20c6be7cb667d25709
Issue-ID: CIMAN-250
Signed-off-by: Jessica Wagantall <jwagantall@linuxfoundation.org>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

James, Mike, 

Can you guys also +1 verify this code?
There is no Jenkins job for this branch, so it will not be +1 by Jenkins

Thanks a ton!!
